{{Quote|About four hundred years ago, my people took their experiments too far. Using the genes of the vesuvague tree and the Bafforrs, along with some other things, they created a new form of life. Like the vesuvague, this creation snared its victims in its tentacle like vines. It also had a group mind like the Bafforr trees. However, unlike the wise Bafforrs, its mind was evil.|[[Fandomar Nadon]]|<ref name="Galaxy of Fear: Spore">''[[Galaxy of Fear: Spore]]''</ref>}}
The '''Ithorian Spore crisis''' was a crisis that occurred on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]] starting in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[439 BBY]]. It was caused by the creation of the entity [[Spore]] by [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]], who spliced [[DNA/Legends|genes]] from the [[bafforr tree]], [[vesuvague tree]] and several other [[Species/Legends|species]]. Spore had a malevolent, collective mind, and sought to control other beings. For almost one hundred years, the Ithorians sought to neutralize Spore, and finally did so with the help of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Spore was neutralized and sealed in a tomb on an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] in the [[Ottega system/Legends|Ithor system]].

The advent of the Ithorian Spore crisis was noted on an issue of [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].
